Learnings

Key Insights

01
HP Sales Performance · Excel
Top products drive revenue, but regional gaps reveal the real opportunity

Sales performance is heavily driven by a small group of top products, with clear regional disparities and varying profit margins, indicating opportunities for market expansion and pricing optimization.

💡Focus on high-margin products while addressing regional gaps to unlock sustainable growth.
02
Pizza Sales Analytics · Power BI
Evenings and weekends dominate, but upselling potential remains untapped

Sales patterns show strong demand during evenings and weekends, with a few high-performing products contributing most of the revenue, while low average order value highlights upselling potential.

💡Leverage peak-hour demand with strategic upselling to significantly boost average order value.
03
Coca-Cola Sales Analysis · Excel
Seasonal swings and regional gaps shape the revenue story

Sales trends exhibit seasonal fluctuations, with top-performing products and regional variations playing a key role in overall revenue performance and strategic decision-making.

💡Align inventory and promotions with seasonal peaks to maximize regional revenue potential.
04
Restaurant Analysis · Python
Traffic patterns expose hidden wins in staffing and inventory

Customer traffic and sales fluctuate by time and day, revealing opportunities to optimize staffing, improve menu profitability, and enhance inventory management efficiency.

💡Data-driven scheduling and menu decisions directly reduce waste and improve profitability.
05
Transceiver Analysis · SQL
Usage patterns and anomalies point to where efficiency breaks down

Data analysis reveals recurring usage patterns and anomalies, highlighting opportunities to improve system efficiency, ensure data integrity, and optimize operational processes.

💡Proactively identifying anomalies in SQL data is the first step to building reliable, optimized systems.
06
Spotify Music Tracker · Power BI
Time-dependent listening unlocks smarter personalization

User listening behavior is highly time-dependent, with a concentration around specific artists and genres, providing insights for personalized recommendations and engagement strategies.

💡Understanding when users engage is as powerful as knowing what they enjoy — time is the hidden dimension.
07
US Resident Analysis · Power BI
Urban centres and key demographics drive the national picture

Population distribution and demographic trends vary significantly across regions, with urban areas and key segments driving major patterns relevant for planning and resource allocation.

💡Demographic segmentation by region turns broad population data into actionable planning intelligence.
Credentials

Certifications & Learning

🐍
✓ Verified
Professional Certification
Python for Data Analysis

Covered Python fundamentals for data work — including Pandas for data wrangling, NumPy for numerical operations, and Matplotlib/Seaborn for visualization. Applied directly to real datasets including the Restaurant Analysis project.

Completed · 2024
PythonPandasSeaborn
🗄️
✓ Verified
Professional Certification
SQL for Data Analysis

Comprehensive SQL certification covering SELECT queries, JOINs, subqueries, GROUP BY aggregations, CTEs, and window functions — all applied to extracting meaningful insights from relational databases.

Completed · 2023
SQLJoinsCTEs
📊
✓ Verified
Professional Certification
Excel for Data Analysis

Advanced Excel certification covering pivot tables, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, Power Query, conditional formatting, dynamic charts, and dashboard design — the foundation behind the Coca-Cola and Sales dashboards.

Completed · 2023
ExcelPivot TablesPower Query
📈
✓ Verified
Professional Certification
Power BI for Data Analysis

Certification focused on building interactive dashboards in Power BI — covering data modelling, DAX measures, relationships, and report design. Directly applied to the Sales Performance, Pizza Sales, and US Resident dashboards.

Completed · 2024
Power BIDAXDashboards
🎨
✓ Verified
Professional Certification
Tableau for Data Visualization

Certification covering Tableau fundamentals through advanced visual analytics — including data connections, calculated fields, LOD expressions, and designing interactive dashboards for clear data storytelling.

Completed · 2024
TableauLODDashboards
